message:
perf(scheduler): derive Copy on SchedulerEntry and TimedEntry

Add Copy to the derive list for SchedulerEntry (TaskId + u8 + u64) and
TimedEntry (TaskId + Time + u64). Both structs are small (24 bytes),
contain only Copy fields, and are frequently moved through BinaryHeap
operations during schedule/pop cycles. Deriving Copy allows the compiler
to use memcpy/register moves instead of going through Drop glue, which
is particularly beneficial in the heap sift-up/sift-down loops where
entries are swapped repeatedly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
